page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.3xlarge is an x86_64 architecture compute-optimized server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz, with 1.0 thread per core. The instance is configured with 24.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 2.0 GB per core allocation. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate a performance profile characterized by average multi-core capabilities and weaker single-core execution. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance and single-threaded gzip compression are positioned in the bottom 25% tier. Conversely, multi-core stress-ng performance, bzip3 decompression, and PassMark CPU tests fall within the middle 50% average tier. Memory bandwidth tests, including cached and uncached reads and writes, also demonstrate average performance.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the instance offers a structured compute-to-memory balance without the overhead of hyperthreading. This configuration is suitable for multi-threaded workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local storage, such as static web serving, Redis database operations, and multi-threaded decompression tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.3xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance featuring 12 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor clocked at 2.5 GHz. Configured with 24.0 GB of RAM, it maintains a 2.0 GB per core ratio and operates on the KVM hypervisor. The instance does not include local storage or GPUs, and it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show a contrast between weak single-core execution and average multi-core capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core, PassMark CPU, and Redis SET operations all scoring in the middle 50% tier. This hardware profile is suited for multi-threaded workloads, static web serving, and database operations that benefit from dedicated CPU resources without requiring high memory density.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.3xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 12 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 24 GB of RAM, and a 4 Gbps network baseline, delivering average multi-core benchmark performance.

tagline: A dedicated twelve-core compute instance with a balanced memory-to-core ratio for multi-threaded processing and web serving workloads.
